project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Slb RIH with Welltec milling BHA. At 1700ft, beaned up. Observed large tension drop so POOH. Second attempt to RIH and had a similar result, so pulled into catcher and been flowing since 03:30. WSS crew change this morning so will continue after lunch. Lookahead has 4th July for MFC but TBC.

project: PRJ03160 - SLB - SLB Denmark - GBN12 (N-12)_GBN43 (N-43) - MFC_ ZeroTime
comment: Logging run expected tomorrow morning. Data expected tomorrow night.

project: PRJ03307 - Well Sanam - Qatar Head Office - NFR4-001_NFR4-009 - MFC
comment: Converted to Memory PDC opportunity with use of PRC022s. Dual pressure sensor required in the string.

project: PRJ03294 - HG Wells Ltd - Norwich Base - A15 - MFC
comment:
Current plan is to mobilise on the 12th July.
The MFC24 will be conducted during the week commencing 13th July.

project: PRJ03335 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-22 - MFC
comment: Latest lookahead suggests Weds AM logging. Confirmation requested from Perenco prior to arranging Engineer travel for tomorrow
